style_effects: Flickering translucent violet mist particles drift slowly around Chansey's form, elongating shadows bending unnaturally in the air. A dim, eerie purple aura pulses gently through her skin, casting distorted reflections on the ground. The lighting mood is cold and misty, with pale moonlight casting long, wavering shadows. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
